title: stelis petiolata
intro: Stelis petiolata, also known as the "Monkey Face Orchid" or "Monkey Face Stelis", is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It is a terrestrial orchid with unique, small flowers and is often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve congestion and soothe coughs, and it is also used to treat fever and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Stelis petiolata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
